description: Create comprehensive figure comparing catalytic sites of S. cerevisiae CTS1 vs S. pombe cts2, showing the missing DxDxE motif
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# === Figure 1: Catalytic site alignment comparison ===
fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [2, 1.5, 1.5]})

# Panel A: Sequence alignment around catalytic site
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 25)
ax1.set_ylim(-1, 5)
ax1.set_title("A. Catalytic Site Alignment: GH18 DxDxE Motif Region", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

# Sequences aligned from AVVDGFD anchor
proteins = {
    'S.c. CTS1 (P29029)\n[active chitinase]': 'AVVDGFDFDIENNNEVGYSAL',
    'S.p. cts2 (Q9C105)\n[chitinase-like]': 'AVVDGFDLEVNKGTNTAYSAF',
    'CaclXIP (coffee)\n[xylanase inhibitor]': 'AIIDGFDLNQNKETNPAYNAL',
}

# Color scheme: conserved=green, substituted=red, neutral=gray
y_positions = [3.5, 2, 0.5]
for idx, (name, seq) in enumerate(proteins.items()):
    y = y_positions[idx]
    ax1.text(-0.5, y, name, fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', ha='right', va='center',
             fontfamily='monospace')
    
    for i, aa in enumerate(seq):
        x = i + 0.5
        
        # Color coding based on position relative to catalytic residues
        # AVVDGFD positions 0-6 are conserved anchor
        if i < 7:  # Conserved anchor AVVDGFD
            color = '#90EE90'  # light green
            if i == 6:  # First D of motif
                color = '#00AA00'  # dark green - catalytic
        elif i == 8:  # Position of D155/E164 (second catalytic D)
            if idx == 0:  # CTS1 - has correct D
                color = '#00AA00'  # green - correct catalytic residue
            else:
                color = '#FF6B6B'  # red - substituted
        elif i == 10:  # Position of E157/N166 (proton donor)
            if idx == 0:  # CTS1 - has correct E
                color = '#00AA00'  # green - catalytic proton donor
            else:
                color = '#FF4444'  # red - critical substitution
        else:
            color = '#E8E8E8'  # light gray
        
        rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x-0.4, y-0.35), 0.8, 0.7,
                                        boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
                                        facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        ax1.add_patch(rect)
        ax1.text(x, y, aa, fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', ha='center', va='center',
                fontfamily='monospace')

# Position labels
for i in range(21):
    ax1.text(i + 0.5, 4.5, str(i+1), fontsize=7, ha='center', va='center', color='gray')

# Annotations for catalytic residues
ax1.annotate('Cat. D1\n(conserved)', xy=(6.5, 4.0), fontsize=8, ha='center', 
            color='darkgreen', fontweight='bold')
ax1.annotate('Cat. D2\n(D→E/N)', xy=(8.5, 4.0), fontsize=8, ha='center',
            color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.annotate('Proton donor\n(E→N/Q)', xy=(10.5, 4.0), fontsize=8, ha='center',
            color='red', fontweight='bold')

ax1.set_axis_off()

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#00AA00', label='Catalytic residue (correct)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#90EE90', label='Conserved anchor'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF4444', label='Critical substitution (loss of catalysis)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#E8E8E8', label='Other positions'),
]
ax1.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower left', fontsize=8, ncol=2)

# Panel B: Domain architecture comparison
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 1300)
ax2.set_ylim(-0.5, 3.5)
ax2.set_title("B. Domain Architecture Comparison", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

# S. cerevisiae CTS1 (562 aa)
ax2.barh(2.5, 562, height=0.6, color='#D4E6F1', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0, 2.25), 25, 0.5, facecolor='#F39C12', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5))
ax2.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((26, 2.25), 285, 0.5, facecolor='#27AE60', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5))
ax2.text(170, 2.5, 'GH18 (active)', fontsize=9, ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(400, 2.5, 'Ser/Thr-rich', fontsize=8, ha='center', va='center')
ax2.text(-10, 2.5, 'CTS1 (562 aa)', fontsize=9, ha='right', va='center', fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(10, 2.9, 'SP', fontsize=7, ha='center')

# S. pombe cts2 (1236 aa)
ax2.barh(1.0, 1236, height=0.6, color='#FADBD8', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0, 0.75), 25, 0.5, facecolor='#F39C12', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5))
ax2.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((25, 0.75), 300, 0.5, facecolor='#E74C3C', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5))
ax2.text(170, 1.0, 'GH18 (inactive)', fontsize=9, ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', color='white')
# Mark Ser/Thr rich region
ax2.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((325, 0.75), 900, 0.5, facecolor='#F5CBA7', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5))
ax2.text(775, 1.0, 'Extensive Ser/Thr-rich region (~900 aa)', fontsize=9, ha='center', va='center')
ax2.text(-10, 1.0, 'cts2 (1236 aa)', fontsize=9, ha='right', va='center', fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(10, 1.4, 'SP', fontsize=7, ha='center')

ax2.set_xlabel('Residue position', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_yticks([])
ax2.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax2.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax2.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# Panel C: Summary table
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_axis_off()
ax3.set_title("C. Key Catalytic Residue Comparison", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

table_data = [
    ['Feature', 'S.c. CTS1\n(active chitinase)', 'S.p. cts2\n(chitinase-like)', 'Status'],
    ['Catalytic D1', 'D153 ✓', 'D162 ✓', 'Conserved'],
    ['Catalytic D2', 'D155 ✓', 'E164 ✗', 'Substituted (D→E)'],
    ['Proton donor E', 'E157 ✓', 'N166 ✗', 'ABSENT (E→N)'],
    ['DxDxE motif', 'DFDIEN ✓', 'DLEVNK ✗', 'DISRUPTED'],
    ['Chitinase activity', 'Confirmed (IDA)', 'Not demonstrated', 'No direct evidence'],
]

colors = [['#D5E8D4'] * 4]  # header
colors.append(['white', '#D5E8D4', '#D5E8D4', '#D5E8D4'])
colors.append(['white', '#D5E8D4', '#FADBD8', '#FADBD8'])
colors.append(['white', '#D5E8D4', '#F8696B', '#F8696B'])
colors.append(['white', '#D5E8D4', '#F8696B', '#F8696B'])
colors.append(['white', '#D5E8D4', '#FADBD8', '#FADBD8'])

table = ax3.table(cellText=table_data, cellColours=colors,
                  loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(9)
table.scale(1, 1.5)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('catalytic_site_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: catalytic_site_comparison.png")
